Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0042",
  "title": "即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段",
  "page_index": 38,
  "page_range": "38-39"
}

Section text:
即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段
在“后IDFA”时代广告成本虽然攀升 但在数据验证之下洗脑素材依然为王
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制。
移动游戏的“洗脑”广告素材依然有着相对明确优劣势
从2018年起，全球移动游戏行业就开始“唱衰”广告买量，表示游戏要进入精品化时代；而2021年苹果默认关闭IDFA权限后，有更多从业者表现出了对游戏广告买量市场的失望
甚至恐慌。但反观全球移动游戏市场，最为典型的必然是原本极度依赖精准买量的SLG类移动游戏，采用了副玩法买量的方式后完全改变了市场格局。在此之前，SLG移动游戏曾
短期陷入“用户获取成本>长期LTV”的死亡螺旋，副玩法买量本质是厂商在数据不确定性与增长焦虑间做出的理性却又不得已的选择​。这对于所有其他品类的游戏也都有极高的
参考价值。
点点数据认为，现如今互联网泛娱乐的大多数形式都在趋向于“极度简化”的方向发展（无论是短视频、短剧、直播带货、甚至团播等），移动游戏的获客方式也在这其中发生着
潜移默化的转变——游戏投放的核心应在于找到产品玩法调性与用户转化效果之间的最佳平衡点，从而在后IDFA时代的存量竞争中占据先机。
Ø​核心机制符号化
将复杂系统简化为直观的视觉符号和重
复口号，瞬间传递核心爽点。
Ø情绪驱动代替理性说服
情绪刺激+重复曝光强行形成记忆点，
抢占用户心智
ØAI时代下借势平台算法流量
洗脑素材可快速生成数百个变体，在快
速迭代的同时也能获取更多流量倾斜
优势：
Ø​口碑与效果两极分化
虽然数据好看，但简单粗暴的广告内容
容易引发部分用户的反感。
Ø承诺“必须”与实物相符
依靠广告创意反向驱动产品，容易导致
研发团队的成员反感，影响产品品质
ØZ世代的效果衰减​乃至完全免疫
Z世代用户生长在信息爆炸的环境，对洗
脑广告有明显的“免疫力”。
劣势：
© 2026 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
39

message.content:
**Topics:** Mobile game user acquisition (ad buying), post-IDFA advertising economics, "brainwashing" ad creatives, SLG sub-gameplay marketing, internet entertainment simplification trends.
**Entities:** Apple (IDFA policy), SLG mobile games, DianDian Data (research source), Z Generation users, short-form video/live commerce platforms.
**Dates:** 2018 (onset of industry pessimism toward ad buying), 2021 (Apple's default IDFA opt-out implementation), 2026 (publication/copyright year).
**Definitions/Concepts:** "Post-IDFA era" (privacy-restricted ad targeting environment), "brainwashing creatives" (simplified, repetitive, emotion-driven ad formats), "sub-gameplay acquisition" (marketing using secondary/minigame mechanics to attract users), "CAC > LTV death spiral" (unsustainable user acquisition economics).
**Procedures/Strategies:** Optimizing ad creatives via core mechanic symbolization, emotion-driven repetition, and AI-generated variant scaling; balancing gameplay tone with conversion metrics; leveraging sub-gameplay ads to bypass targeting limitations.
**Claims:** Ad buying remains the dominant acquisition channel despite rising costs and stock competition; brainwashing creatives outperform in data validation despite polarized reception; sub-gameplay ads rescued SLG games from unsustainable CAC/LTV ratios; internet entertainment is shifting toward extreme simplification, directly influencing game marketing strategies.
**Tables/Figures:** Contains a DianDian Data research figure/chart illustrating mobile game ad trends, SLG market shifts, or a structured breakdown of brainwashing ad advantages/disadvantages.
**Metrics:** User Acquisition Cost (CAC), Long-term Lifetime Value (LTV), ad cost escalation, conversion rates, algorithmic traffic allocation efficiency.
**Evidence Types:** Industry trend analysis, platform policy impact assessment, genre-specific case study (SLG adaptation), generational user behavior observation, data-driven creative validation.
